creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text: I tried it on alderlake and the build error surely happens. But if I build Ruby 3.0.4 without using port (that is, tar xfpvJ ruby-3.0.4.txz; cd ruby-3.0.4; ./configure ; make) then it doesn't happen. Does this means that the problem happens only with FreeBSD Ruby ports? Does anybody succeeds in reproducing the build error with the latter way?
